web.title: Is there an actual fix for Chrome black screen? : r/radeon - Reddit
web.description: The only advice on the internet is to turn off hardware acceleration, which is not a fix, it is a mitigation while leaving the issue unfixed.

web.title: Hardware acceleration causes black screen - Google Help
web.description: Ensure the Nvidia Control Panel is set to use your dedicated GPU for Chrome. Disable conflicting Chrome shortcut flags such as --disable-gpu .

web.description: Chrome has a black screen? Hardware acceleration problems after GPU swap? How to fix Chrome black screen issues... Consider Supporting Me On ...

web.title: Question / Help - Window Capture Black Screen in Chrome
web.description: The problem is, I recently upgraded from Windows 7 to Windows 10 and now whenever I try to capture a window in Chrome, it's just a black screen.

web.title: How to get gpu acceleration working in chromium browsers for AMD ...
web.description: Is there any dependency, which is required to get GPU acceleration working for chromium browsers in combination with amdgpu driver?

web.title: How to fix black screen when streaming Chrome on Source-Live Pro ...
web.description: Go to Advanced > System. Slide the toggle to disable “Use hardware acceleration when available”: Click “Relaunch”. Re-open the "Capture Window" menu ...
